info.title: Lythaus (formerly Asora) API
info.description: HTTP contract for Lythaus (formerly Asora) Functions v1.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Lythaus admin moderation and safety operations.

tags.name: Privacy
tags.description: User data portability and account deletion (GDPR/CCPA).

tags.name: Privacy Admin
tags.description: Data Subject Request and legal hold administration.

get.description: Return a page of feed items.

Cache-Control.description: Cache directive (private for authenticated, public for anonymous)

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client may retry

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the enforced window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests before hitting the limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix epoch seconds when the window resets

502.description: Upstream dependency returned an unexpected response

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (dependency outage or maintenance)

get.description: Validates an invite code without revealing status details.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client may retry

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the enforced window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests before hitting the limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix epoch seconds when the window resets

post.description: Create a new post.

id.description: Client generated UUID v7 for the new post

403.description: Authenticated caller lacks required permissions or content blocked

post.description: Flag content for review.

targetId.description: Identifier of the content being flagged

get.description: Returns grouped flagged content for admin triage.
Fetch details for a flagged content item.

post.description: Marks a flag as resolved with a reason code.
Sets content state to BLOCKED.
Sets content state to PUBLISHED.

get.description: Fetch appeal detail with content and decision context.

post.description: Approves an appeal and restores content to PUBLISHED. Overrides existing outcomes.
Rejects an appeal and keeps content BLOCKED. Overrides existing outcomes.
Moderator override for appeal outcomes. Idempotent per appeal.

409.description: Override already processed or not allowed

get.description: Search by user id, handle, display name, or email.

post.description: Disables a user account immediately.
Re-enables a previously disabled user.

get.description: Returns admin invite codes with usage metadata.

post.description: Creates a single admin invite code.
Creates multiple invite codes in a single request.

get.description: Fetch a single invite by code.

delete.description: Permanently removes an invite code record. Use revoke to soft-revoke instead.

post.description: Revokes an invite code immediately.

post.summary: Enqueue a Data Subject Request export
post.description: Queues an export job for a user's data as part of GDPR/CCPA compliance. Returns immediately with job tracking info.

post.summary: Enqueue a Data Subject Request delete
post.description: Queues a deletion job for a user's data as part of GDPR/CCPA right-to-erasure compliance. Returns immediately with job tracking info.
Places a legal hold on a user's data, preventing deletion until the hold is cleared. Used for litigation or regulatory preservation.

404.description: Target scope or resource not found

post.description: Removes a previously placed legal hold, allowing normal data lifecycle operations (including deletion) to resume.

Exchange an authorization code or refresh token for an access token and refresh token.
Implements OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code with PKCE (RFC 7636) and Refresh Token grants.

get.description:
Initiates the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow. On success, issues a 302 redirect to
the `redirect_uri` with an authorization `code` and the `state` parameter echoed back.

302.description: Redirect to redirect_uri with authorization code

Location.description: Redirect URI with code and state query parameters

get.description: Returns claims about the authenticated user per OpenID Connect Core 1.0.

post.description: POST variant of the UserInfo endpoint for clients that cannot use query strings.

post.summary: Redeem an invite code to activate account
post.description:
Allows an authenticated but inactive user to redeem a valid invite code.
On success the user is activated and a fresh token pair is returned.

File an appeal against a moderation decision. Authenticated users with active
accounts may appeal content removals. Daily appeal limits are tier-gated.

value.statement: I believe this was flagged in error because...

400.description: Invalid appeal payload or daily limit exceeded

403.description: Account disabled or does not meet eligibility

post.summary: Cast a community vote on an appeal
post.description:
Authenticated community members may cast a weighted vote (`uphold` or `deny`) on
an open appeal. Duplicate votes are rejected. Vote eligibility and quorum rules
are enforced server-side.

400.description: Invalid vote value or duplicate vote

get.description:
Returns a structured copy of all personal data held for the authenticated user.
Export cooldown periods are tier-gated. The `X-Export-ID` response header
contains the export identifier for tracking.

X-Export-ID.description: Unique identifier for this export job

429.description: Rate limit or export cooldown active

delete.description:
Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and anonymises all authored
content. Requires the `X-Confirm-Delete: true` header to guard against accidental
invocations. This action is **irreversible**.

parameters.name: X-Confirm-Delete
parameters.description: Must be set to "true" to confirm deletion

400.description: Missing confirmation header or invalid request

post.summary: Retry a failed data subject request
Ingest news items into the news board
Reset a moderation class to defaults

get.summary: Proxy GET to Hive AI test endpoint

post.summary: Proxy POST to Hive AI test endpoint

put.summary: Proxy PUT to Hive AI test endpoint

delete.summary: Proxy DELETE to Hive AI test endpoint

patch.summary: Proxy PATCH to Hive AI test endpoint

post.summary: Cast a community vote on an appeal

get.summary: Return Azure AD B2C OIDC configuration
List custom feeds for the current user
List items in a custom feed
Return a public user's post feed

post.summary: Record a decision on a moderation case

get.summary: List items in the review queue

post.summary: Submit content to moderation pipeline for testing

get.summary: List notifications for the current user
Get bookmark status for a post
Get engagement insights for a post
Get like status for a post
Get read receipt for a post

post.summary: Create a comment on a post

get.summary: Get follow status for a user
Get trust passport for a user

error.description: Constant identifier for rate limit breaches

scope.description: Scope of the limit that triggered the breach

limit.description: Maximum requests permitted within the window

window_seconds.description: Window size for the limit in seconds

reason.description: Additional context for specialized scopes (e.g. auth backoff)

valid.description: True when the invite code is active and redeemable.

ErrorResponse.description: Canonical error envelope returned by handler-based endpoints.

message.example: The request body is missing required field "text"

details.description: Optional structured details (e.g. field-level validation errors)

ValidationErrorResponse.description: 400 response with structured field-level validation failures.

message.example: Authorization token is missing or invalid

ForbiddenError.description: 403 – authenticated caller lacks required role or permission.

message.example: You do not have permission to perform this action

ModerationBlockedResponse.description: Returned when content is rejected by the moderation pipeline.

status.description: Content was rejected by automated moderation

moderationCategory.description: Primary moderation class that triggered the block

AppealCreatedResponse.description: 201 response after successfully filing a moderation appeal.

AppealVoteRequest.description: Payload for casting a community vote on an appeal.

AppealVoteResponse.description: Confirmation of a recorded appeal vote.

DSRExportResponse.description: GDPR Article 20 data portability export payload.

exportedBy.description: User ID of the exporting account

userId.description: User whose data is contained in this export

alreadyDeleted.description: True when the account was already in a deleted state

nextCursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page; null when no further pages exist

applied.description: Applied ranking modifiers and personalization signals

redirect_uri.description: Must match the redirect URI used during authorization

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (required when code_challenge was provided)

RedeemInviteRequest.description: Request body for redeeming an invite code.

RedeemInviteResponse.description: Successful invite redemption – includes fresh token pair.

activated.description: True when account was newly activated by this redemption

ModerationAppealRequest.description: Request body for filing a moderation appeal.

caseId.description: Identifier of the moderation case being appealed

statement.description: User's statement explaining why the decision should be reversed
statement.example: I believe this content was flagged in error because...

ServiceUnavailableError.description: 503 – service temporarily unavailable (dependency outage, maintenance window, or upstream timeout).

message.example: Service temporarily unavailable. Please retry after the indicated delay.

retryAfterSeconds.description: Suggested number of seconds to wait before retrying

BadGatewayError.description: 502 – bad gateway (upstream service returned an invalid or unexpected response).

message.example: An upstream service returned an unexpected response. Please try again.

cursorParam.name: cursor
cursorParam.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned in the previous response's `meta.nextCursor`

limitParam.name: limit
limitParam.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

XCorrelationID.description: Server-generated correlation identifier for distributed tracing. Include in support requests.

RetryAfter.description: Seconds until the client may retry the request

XRateLimitLimit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the enforced window

XRateLimitRemaining.description: Remaining requests before the limit is hit

XRateLimitReset.description: Unix epoch seconds when the current rate-limit window resets
